title: Nḓila ya Ifa u Fhira kha Mavundu a Afrika Tshipembe
subject: History
caps_topic: A heritage trail through the provinces of South Africa

slides.eyebrow: Ḓivhazwakale ya Giredi ya 5 - Kḽasi ya Vhukati
slides.title: Nḓila ya Ifa u Fhira kha Mavundu a Afrika Tshipembe
slides.lead: Kha ri fare lwendo kha mavundu oṱhe a ṱahe, ri wane fhethu ha nṱhani, mafhungo na sialala zwine zwa vha zwashu roṱhe.

media.alt: Mmbele ya muvhala wa Afrika Tshipembe i re na dzikhwara dzine dza sumbedza fhethu ha ifa kha shango ḽoṱhe.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 320 200' role='img'><rect width='320' height='200' fill='#f4efe6'/><path d='M60 60 L150 46 L210 54 L262 78 L268 118 L232 152 L196 168 L150 160 L120 172 L92 150 L70 118 L54 92 Z' fill='#7a8b5a' stroke='#4d5c37' stroke-width='2'/><circle cx='190' cy='84' r='6' fill='#8a1f1f'/><circle cx='210' cy='70' r='6' fill='#e8a13a'/><circle cx='120' cy='150' r='6' fill='#2f5233'/><circle cx='215' cy='140' r='6' fill='#8a1f1f'/><circle cx='150' cy='110' r='6' fill='#e8a13a'/><path d='M120 150 Q160 90 210 70' fill='none' stroke='#8a1f1f' stroke-width='2' stroke-dasharray='5 5'/></svg>

slides.notes: Ṱanganedzani vhagudiswa ni ṱalutshedze muhumbulo wa 'lwendo lwa ifa' - lwendo lwa u humbulela lune lwa ima kha fhethu ha nṱhani kha Afrika Tshipembe yoṱhe. Vhudzisani: hu na muthu o no dalela muziyamu, tshifhaṱo tsha kale, tshikumbulo kana fhethu ha mupo? Lwendo lwa ifa lu ṱanganyisa fhethu heho. Musi ngudo i tshi fhela vhagudiswa vha fanela u kona u bula fhethu ha ifa kha mavundu o fhambanaho na u amba uri ndi ngani ri tshi ha tsireledza.

slides.title: Ifa ndi mini?
slides.lead: Ifa ndi zwithu zwoṱhe zwine ra zwi wana u bva kha zwo fhiraho na zwine ra ṱoḓa u zwi vhulunga vhumatshelo.

blocks.text: **Ifa** ndi zwithu zwine ra zwi wana kha vhathu vhe vha tshila phanḓa hashu. Zwi nga vha zwithu zwine ra nga zwi fara, zwi ngaho zwifhaṱo zwa kale na zwishumiswa, na zwithu zwine ra sa nga zwi fara, zwi ngaho nyimbo, mafhungo, nyambo na nḓila dza u bika. Ifa ḽi ri thusa u ḓivha uri ri vhonnyi na uri ri bva ngafhi.

items: **Ifa ḽa mupo** - thavha dza nṱhani, mabako, milambo na zwipuka.
**Ifa ḽa mvelele** - zwifhaṱo, zwikumbulo, vhutsila na zwithu zwa kale.
**Ifa ḽi tshilaho** - nyambo, muzika, mitshino, zwiḽiwa na mikosi.

media.alt: Zwifanyisoluswayo zwiraru zwo leluwaho: thavha, tshifhaṱo tsha kale na ngoma, zwi sumbedza tshaka tharu dza ifa.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 300 140' role='img'><rect width='300' height='140' fill='#f4efe6'/><path d='M20 110 L55 50 L90 110 Z' fill='#7a8b5a'/><path d='M55 50 L70 74 L60 82 Z' fill='#fff'/><rect x='120' y='60' width='60' height='50' fill='#c8b89a'/><path d='M116 60 L150 34 L184 60 Z' fill='#8a1f1f'/><rect x='142' y='80' width='16' height='30' fill='#7a5a3a'/><ellipse cx='250' cy='66' rx='24' ry='10' fill='#e8a13a'/><path d='M226 66 v34 a24 10 0 0 0 48 0 v-34' fill='#c8871f'/></svg>

slides.notes: Ṋeani tsumbo dzo khwaṱhaho kha lushaka lunwe na lunwe uri vhagudiswa vha Giredi ya 5 vha kone u zwi humbula: mupo (Thavha ya Ṱafula/Table Mountain), mvelele (Union Buildings), ifa ḽi tshilaho (u imba isicathamiya, braai ya muṱa, u anetshela ngano). Ombedzelani uri ifa ḽi tshilaho ḽi tshila kha vhathu, hu si kha tshifhaṱo. Rambani vhagudiswa uri vha bule tshipiḓa tshithihi tsha ifa u bva kha muṱa wavho.

slides.eyebrow: Fhethu hune shango ḽoṱhe ḽa tsireledza
slides.title: Fhethu ha Ifa ḽa Shango ha Afrika Tshipembe
slides.lead: Fhethu hanwe hashu ndi ha nṱhani lune shango ḽoṱhe ḽa thusa u ha ṱhogomela.

blocks.text: **Fhethu ha Ifa ḽa Shango** ndi fhethu ho nangwaho nga tshiimiswa tshine tsha pfi **UNESCO** ngauri hu ndeme kha vhathu vhoṱhe kha ḽifhasi, hu si shango ḽithihi fhedzi. Afrika Tshipembe i na fhethu ha **fumi (10)** ha nga u ralo, ho phaḓalala kha mavundu. Kha lwendo lwashu ri ḓo dalela hunwe hahwo.

items: Hanwe ho nangelwa mupo, ha ngaho thavha dza Cape na Drakensberg.
Hanwe ho nangelwa ḓivhazwakale, ha ngaho Mapungubwe na Robben Island.
U vha kha mutevhe zwi amba uri fhethu ho tsireledzwa vhana vha vhumatshelo.

media.alt: Baḓzhi ḽo tenda ḽi re na globu nga ngomu, ḽi ngaho luswayo lwa Ifa ḽa Shango.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 200 140' role='img'><rect width='200' height='140' fill='#f4efe6'/><circle cx='100' cy='70' r='46' fill='none' stroke='#2f5233' stroke-width='5'/><circle cx='100' cy='70' r='26' fill='#a8bcae'/><path d='M74 70 h52 M100 44 v52 M82 54 q18 16 36 0 M82 86 q18 -16 36 0' fill='none' stroke='#2f5233' stroke-width='2'/><rect x='60' y='118' width='80' height='6' fill='#e8a13a'/></svg>

slides.notes: Litshani ṱhaluso i tshi vha i leluwaho: UNESCO ndi tshigwada tsha kha United Nations tshine tsha ita mutevhe wa nṱhani wa fhethu ha ndeme vhukuma kha shango. A hu ṱoḓei uri vhagudiswa vha hangwele tshivhalo tsho teaho - mafhungo ndi uri Afrika Tshipembe i pfuma nga fhethu ha nga u ralo. [SME] Ni khou humbelwa u khwaṱhisedza tshivhalo tsha zwino tsha Fhethu ha Ifa ḽa Shango ha UNESCO ha Afrika Tshipembe (ho vha hu fumi nga 2023) ngudo i sa athu bveledzwa.

slides.title: Fhethu hathihi ha ifa kha vundu ḽinwe na ḽinwe
slides.lead: Mavundu a ṱahe, fhethu ha ṱahe ha ḓivhea u dalela kha lwendo lwashu.

blocks.heading: Gauteng
blocks.text: Tshiswiswi tsha Vhathu (Cradle of Humankind) - mabako a re na masalela a vhathu a kale vhukuma.

blocks.heading: Limpopo
blocks.text: Mapungubwe - muvhuso wa u thoma wa Afrika Tshipembe na tshifhambano tsha musuku.

blocks.heading: Western Cape
blocks.text: Robben Island - dziṱhoho hune Nelson Mandela o vha o valelwa hone.

blocks.heading: KwaZulu-Natal
blocks.text: Thavha dza Drakensberg - zwigidi zwa zwifanyiso zwa matombo zwa Vhasann (San).

blocks.heading: Eastern Cape
blocks.text: Qunu na Mthatha - fhethu ha vhuṱhannga ha Nelson Mandela.

blocks.heading: Northern Cape
blocks.text: Ifa ḽa Vhasann na zwiṱunḓu zwa matombo zwa kale kha Karoo yo omaho.

blocks.heading: Free State
blocks.text: Miḓi ya Vhasotho na Vredefort Dome i re tsini.

blocks.heading: North West
blocks.text: Taung, hune ha wanwa lukhoro lwa ṅwana wa kale.

blocks.heading: Mpumalanga
blocks.text: Thavha dza Makhonjwa dza Barberton - manwe a matombo a kale vhukuma kha ḽifhasi.

slides.notes: Hei ndi sileidi ya musaukanyo. Vhalani vundu ḽinwe na ḽinwe na fhethu haḽo nga ipfi ḽo pfalaho, ni sumbe fhethu hune ha wanala hone kha mmbele ya u humbulela (kana mmbele ya luvhondo arali ni na yone). Vhudzani vhagudiswa uri dzisileidi dzi tevhelaho dzi ḓo sedzesa hunwe hahwo. Ni nga humbela mugudiswa muṅwe na muṅwe uri a nange fhethu hune a tama u ha dalela vhukuma na u amba uri ndi ngani. [SME] Khwaṱhisedzani uri u ṱanganyiswa ha vundu na fhethu zwi tea kḽasi yaṋu; vundu ḽinwe na ḽinwe ḽi na fhethu ha ifa hunzhi nahone vhadededzi vha nga takalela tsumbo dza hune vha dzula hone.

slides.title: Tshiswiswi tsha Vhathu (Cradle of Humankind)
slides.lead: Tshigwada tsha mabako tsini na Johannesburg hune vhoramaḓivhemvelo vha wana manwe a masalela a kale vhukuma a muṱa wa vhathu kha shango.

blocks.text: Kha **Mabako a Sterkfontein** vhoramaḓivhemvelo vho gwa **masalela (fossils)** - marambo o shandukaho tombo - a vhathu vha kale vhe vha tshila miḽioni ya miṅwaha yo fhiraho. Zwe zwa wanwa zwi ḓivheaho zwi katela lukhoro lwe lwa vhidzwa 'Mrs Ples' na tshirunwa tshine tsha ṱoḓou fhelela tshine tsha vhidzwa 'Little Foot'. Ndi ngazwo fhethu heho hu tshi vhidzwa *Tshiswiswi tsha Vhathu*.

items: Tshiswiswi ndi hune ṅwana a eḓela hone - nga zwenezwo hu nga fhethu ha u bebelwa ha vhathu.
Ndi Fhethu ha Ifa ḽa Shango ngauri hu anetshela mafhungo a vhathu vhoṱhe.
Ni kha ḓi kona u dalela mabako na muziyamu ṋamusi.

media.alt: Tshifanyiso tsha bako fhasi ha mavu tshi re na lukhoro lwa masalela nga ngomu.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 150' role='img'><rect width='240' height='150' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect y='30' width='240' height='120' fill='#7a5a3a'/><path d='M50 70 q70 -30 140 0 q20 30 -10 44 q-60 24 -120 0 q-30 -14 -10 -44 Z' fill='#3a2c1c'/><circle cx='120' cy='96' r='14' fill='#e6ddc8'/><circle cx='115' cy='94' r='3' fill='#3a2c1c'/><circle cx='125' cy='94' r='3' fill='#3a2c1c'/><rect x='114' y='104' width='12' height='6' fill='#c8b89a'/><rect y='24' width='240' height='8' fill='#7a8b5a'/></svg>

slides.notes: Ṱalutshedzani 'masalela (fossil)' zwavhuḓi: marambo o shandukaho tombo zwiṱuku nga zwiṱuku lwa tshifhinga tshilapfu vhukuma. Little Foot na Mrs Ples zwi ita uri saintsi i pfale i ya vhukuma kha vhagudiswa. Litshani muhumbulo wa tshifhinga tshilapfu u tshi vha wo leluwaho - 'kaleni-kaleni, hu tshifhinga tshilapfu u fhira zwine ra nga humbula.' Vhuyeledzani kha khaḓi ya sileidi ya 5. [SME] Datumu dzo lelutshwa nga khole; khwaṱhisedzani tshivhalo tshinwe na tshinwe tshine mudededzi a nanga u tshi engedza nga ipfi ḽo pfalaho.

slides.title: Muvhuso wa Mapungubwe
slides.lead: Kaleni, kha thavha yo sikaho nṱha kha devhula ḽa kule, ho vha hu na dorobo khulwane ya muvhuso wa u thoma wa Afrika Tshipembe.

blocks.text: Hu tou vha miṅwaha ya 700 u swika 800 yo fhiraho, **Mapungubwe** ho vha muvhuso wo ḓoweaho hune vhathu vha lima, vha fuwa kholomo na u rengisa musuku na maṋo a nḓou na mashango a kule. Khosi ya vha i tshi dzula nṱha ha thavha ya nṱhani. Vhaḓivhi vha zwa kale vho ḓo wana zwithu zwavhuḓi zwa musuku henefho, zwi katela **tshifhambano tsha musuku** tshiṱuku.

items: Zwi sumbedza uri mivhuso mihulwane ya Afrika yo vha i hone hafha kaleni, Vhaeuropa vha sathu swika.
Tshifhambano tsha musuku zwino ndi luswayo lu ḓivheaho lwa ḓivhazwakale ya Afrika Tshipembe.
Mapungubwe ndi Fhethu ha Ifa ḽa Shango kha mukano na Zimbabwe na Botswana.

media.alt: Thavha yo sikaho nṱha i re na tshivhumbeo tshiṱuku tsha tshifhambano tsha musuku phanḓa hayo.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 150' role='img'><rect width='240' height='150' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect y='110' width='240' height='40' fill='#c8b89a'/><path d='M60 110 L60 60 Q60 52 70 52 L170 52 Q180 52 180 60 L180 110 Z' fill='#a8794a'/><ellipse cx='120' cy='52' rx='60' ry='8' fill='#c08a52'/><circle cx='210' cy='40' r='18' fill='#e8a13a'/><g fill='#d4a017'><ellipse cx='120' cy='128' rx='26' ry='10'/><rect x='100' y='120' width='6' height='14'/><rect x='134' y='120' width='6' height='14'/><path d='M146 124 l10 -4 l-2 6 Z'/></g></svg>

slides.notes: Sileidi iyi i lugisa ngano yo ḓoweaho nga u sumbedza muvhuso wa Afrika wo khwaṱhaho, wo pfumaho we wa bvelela kaleni-kaleni, tshifhinga tsha vhukoloni tshi sa athu ḓa. Ombedzelani u rengisa (musuku na maṋo a nḓou zwi tshi tshimbila kule nga lwanzhe) na tshifhambano tsha musuku sa lupfumo. Vhagudiswa vha Giredi ya 6 vha ḓo guda Mapungubwe nga vhuḓalo nga murahu, ngauralo ni khou zwala mbeu. Litshani datumu dzi tshi vha dzo tenda ('hu tou vha miṅwaha ya 700-800 yo fhiraho').

slides.title: Robben Island
slides.lead: Tshiṱangadzime tshiṱuku lwanzheni tsini na Cape Town tshe tsha vha dziṱhoho dzi ḓivheaho - na luswayo lwa mbofholowo.

blocks.text: Miṅwaha minzhi **Robben Island** ho vha dziṱhoho. Nga tshifhinga tsha apartheid (khethululo), vharangaphanḓa vhe vha lwela pfanelo dzo linganaho vho valelwa hafha, kule na miṱa yavho. **Nelson Mandela** o fhedza miṅwaha minzhi kha tshiṱhoho tshiṱuku kha tshiṱangadzime a sa athu vhofhololwa, nga murahu a vha muphuresidennde wa u thoma wa Afrika Tshipembe o nangwaho nga demokirasi.

items: Ṋamusi ndi muziyamu une wa funza vhadaleli nga ha nndwa ya mbofholowo.
Vhaṅwe vha vhasumbedzi ndi vhe vha vha vhavhofholwa, vhane vha kovha mafhungo avho.
Zwi ri humbudza u dzhiela nṱha mbofholowo na pfanelo dzine ra vha nadzo ṋamusi.

media.alt: Tshiṱangadzime tshiṱuku tshi re na tshibofu tsha tshedza lwanzheni, hu na Thavha ya Ṱafula (Table Mountain) kule.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 150' role='img'><rect width='240' height='150' fill='#cfe3ec'/><rect y='96' width='240' height='54' fill='#5f86a3'/><path d='M150 70 L215 70 L215 96 L150 96 Z' fill='#8a9b78'/><path d='M150 70 L160 70 L160 96 L150 96 Z' fill='#7a8b5a'/><ellipse cx='70' cy='100' rx='58' ry='12' fill='#c8b89a'/><rect x='60' y='72' width='12' height='30' fill='#f4efe6'/><path d='M60 72 L78 72 L72 60 L66 60 Z' fill='#8a1f1f'/><rect x='63' y='60' width='6' height='6' fill='#e8a13a'/></svg>

slides.notes: Farani apartheid (khethululo) nga vhuronwane na nga u leluwa kha Giredi ya 5: vhathu vhaṅwe vho farwa nga nḓila i songo lugaho nga ṅwambo wa muvhala wa lukanda lwavho, nahone vhathu vha tshivhindi vho shuma u shandukisa zwenezwo. Vhonani Robben Island sa fhethu ha vhuṱungu na fulufhelo. Ṱumanyani na Ḓuvha ḽa Mbofholowo / Nelson Mandela arali vhagudiswa vha tshi mu ḓivha. Iledzani zwidodombedzwa zwo tolaho; sedzani tshivhindi na ndeme ya mbofholowo.

slides.title: Vhutsila ha Matombo ha Drakensberg
slides.lead: Nṱha kha thavha dza Drakensberg hu na zwigidi zwa zwifanyiso zwe zwa itwa nga Vhasann kaleni.

blocks.text: **uKhahlamba-Drakensberg** ndi mutevhe wa thavha ndapfu vhukuma wa Afrika Tshipembe. Mabako ayo na fhethu ha u tshira ha matombo hu na zwigidi zwa **zwifanyiso zwa matombo** zwe zwa itwa nga **Vhasann** vhe vha vha vhazwimi na vhakuvhanganyi. Vho penda vhathu, phofu (eland), na zwine vha zwi tenda vha tshi shumisa dzipennde dza mupo dzo bvaho kha matombo, zwimela na zwipuka.

items: Dzina uKhahlamba ḽi amba 'thivhelo ya mapfumo' nga isiZulu.
Zwifanyiso zwi na miṅwaha ya maḓana na dzigidi.
Ndi Fhethu ha Ifa ḽa Shango nga mupo wayo na vhutsila hayo ha kale.

media.alt: Luvhondo lwa bako lu re na zwifanyiso zwa matombo zwa Vhasann zwa phofu (eland) na tshivhumbeo tsha muthu a tshi gidima.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 150' role='img'><rect width='240' height='150' fill='#e6dcc4'/><path d='M0 0 L240 0 L240 24 Q120 40 0 24 Z' fill='#b7a98d'/><g fill='#8a4b2a'><ellipse cx='150' cy='84' rx='34' ry='20'/><rect x='124' y='96' width='6' height='24'/><rect x='140' y='98' width='6' height='24'/><rect x='158' y='98' width='6' height='24'/><rect x='176' y='96' width='6' height='24'/><path d='M184 70 l16 -14 l2 6 Z'/><path d='M188 74 l16 -10 l0 6 Z'/></g><g fill='#7a2f1a'><circle cx='60' cy='70' r='7'/><rect x='57' y='77' width='6' height='22'/><path d='M60 82 l-14 8 M60 82 l14 6 M60 99 l-10 18 M60 99 l12 16' stroke='#7a2f1a' stroke-width='3' fill='none'/></g></svg>

slides.notes: Ḓivhadzani Vhasann sa vhathu vha u thoma vha Afrika Tshipembe na vhutsila havho na u anetshela mafhungo. Ṱalutshedzani nḓila ye pennde ya itwa ngayo u bva kha zwithu zwa mupo (ochre, malasha, maḓi a zwimela, mapfura a zwipuka). Phofu (eland) ho vha tshipuka tsha ndeme vhukuma kha zwe Vhasann vha zwi tenda. Farani ifa ḽa Vhasann nga ṱhonifho - hezwi ndi zwifanyiso zwikhethwa kha zwitshavha zwa vhaḓuhulu. Ṱumanyani na zwiṱunḓu zwa matombo zwa Northern Cape kha sileidi i tevhelaho.

slides.title: U Fhira Karoo na Free State
slides.lead: Manwe mafhethu mararu kha lwendo lwashu - kha Eastern Cape, Northern Cape na Free State.

blocks.heading: Eastern Cape - Qunu
blocks.text: Thavhana dza dovha hune Nelson Mandela a hula hone. Muziyamu wa Mthatha u anetshela vhutshilo hawe.

blocks.heading: Northern Cape - Wildebeest Kuil
blocks.text: Thavha yo faraho zwiṱunḓu zwa matombo zwa kale, zwine zwa ṱhogomelwa nga zwitshavha zwa Vhasann na Vhakhoe.

blocks.heading: Free State - Basotho Village
blocks.text: Muziyamu u tshilaho hune na nga vhona nnḓu dza sialala dza Vhasotho dzi re na milando yo pendwaho zwavhuḓi.

media.alt: Zwifanyiso zwiṱuku zwiraru: thavhana dzi tshi ela, tombo ḽo ṱunḓulwaho, na tshiṱumba tsho tendaho tsho pendwaho.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 300 130' role='img'><rect width='300' height='130' fill='#f4efe6'/><path d='M10 90 q25 -30 50 0 q25 30 50 0 L110 110 L10 110 Z' fill='#7a8b5a'/><path d='M120 60 l50 8 l-6 44 l-46 -6 Z' fill='#a8794a'/><g stroke='#5a3a1a' stroke-width='2' fill='none'><circle cx='140' cy='84' r='8'/><path d='M150 78 l10 4 M132 92 l-6 8'/></g><path d='M212 108 a30 30 0 0 1 60 0 Z' fill='#c8b89a'/><path d='M206 82 l36 -22 l36 22 Z' fill='#8a5a2a'/><rect x='236' y='90' width='12' height='18' fill='#7a5a3a'/><g stroke='#8a1f1f' stroke-width='2'><path d='M214 100 h46 M218 106 h38'/></g></svg>

slides.notes: Fhethu hararu heha hu andisa lwendo u ya kha mavundu manzhi na tshaka nnzhi dza ifa: fhethu ha u bebelwa ha muthu (Eastern Cape), vhutsila ha kale (zwiṱunḓu zwa Northern Cape, zwine zwa vejwa kha tombo nṱhani ha u pendwa khaḽo), na ifa ḽi tshilaho kha muḓi u shumaho (Free State). Sumbedzani phambano vhukati ha zwifanyiso zwa matombo (KZN) na zwiṱunḓu zwa matombo (Northern Cape). [SME] Vhewani fhethu ha hune ha dzula hone ha Eastern Cape kana Free State arali hu tshi tea vhagudiswa vhaṋu zwavhuḓi.

slides.title: Matombo a kale na ṅwana wa kale
slides.lead: Fhethu ha vhuvhili ha u fhedza ha mavundu hu ya North West na Mpumalanga.

blocks.heading: North West - Taung
blocks.text: Nga 1924 lukhoro lwa masalela lwa ṅwana wa kale, 'Taung Child', lwo wanwa hafha. Zwo thusa shango u guda uri vhathu vho thoma Afrika.

blocks.heading: Mpumalanga - Barberton
blocks.text: Thavha dza Makhonjwa dzi na manwe a matombo a kale vhukuma kha ḽifhasi - a tou vha miṅwaha ya 3 500 miḽioni - zwino ndi Fhethu ha Ifa ḽa Shango.

blocks.heading: Bonus - Gauteng
blocks.text: Freedom Park na Constitution Hill kha devhula zwi humbula nndwa ya pfanelo dza vhathu na demokirasi.

media.alt: Lukhoro luṱuku lwa masalela tsini na thavha dza kale dzo ṱaṱamaho.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 130' role='img'><rect width='240' height='130' fill='#f4efe6'/><path d='M120 30 L180 110 L60 110 Z' fill='#6b7a8c'/><path d='M170 55 L210 110 L130 110 Z' fill='#8091a3'/><path d='M60 70 L95 110 L25 110 Z' fill='#5a6878'/><g><circle cx='95' cy='84' r='16' fill='#e6ddc8'/><circle cx='89' cy='82' r='3' fill='#3a2c1c'/><circle cx='100' cy='82' r='3' fill='#3a2c1c'/><path d='M90 92 q5 5 10 0' fill='none' stroke='#3a2c1c' stroke-width='2'/></g></svg>

slides.notes: Taung i vhuyelela kha thero ya Tshiswiswi tsha Vhathu - Afrika Tshipembe ndi mbumbeloni ya mafhungo a vhubvo ha vhathu. Barberton i sumbedza ifa ḽa mupo ḽa lushaka lunwe: matombo a kale vhukuma. Khaḓi ya bonus i ni tendela u bula fhethu ha demokirasi ha Gauteng (Freedom Park, Constitution Hill). [SME] Khwaṱhisedzani ṅwaha we ha wanwa Taung Child (1924) na miṅwaha yo tendwaho ya tombo (hu tou vha miṅwaha ya 3 500 miḽioni) arali ni tshi zwi bula nga ipfi ḽo pfalaho.

slides.eyebrow: Ifa ḽine na nga ḽi pfa, ḽa ḽofa na u tshina
slides.title: Ifa ḽi tshilaho na Ḓuvha ḽa Ifa
slides.lead: A si ifa ḽoṱhe ḽine ḽa dzula ḽo dzika muziyamuni - ḽiṅwe ḽi tshila kha zwine ra zwi ita ḓuvha ḽinwe na ḽinwe.

blocks.text: **Ifa ḽi tshilaho** ḽi fhiriselwa u bva kha vhomakhulu u ya kha vhabebi u swika kha vhana. Ḽi katela **nyambo dzashu dza tshiofisi dza 11**, nyimbo dzashu na mitshino, mafhungo ashu, zwiambaro zwashu na zwiḽiwa zwine ra zwi funesa. Ṅwaha muṅwe na muṅwe nga **24 Khubvumedzi (September)** Afrika Tshipembe i pembelela **Ḓuvha ḽa Ifa**, musi ri tshi hulisa mvelele dzashu dzoṱhe dzo fhambanaho.

items: Muzika na mitshino i ngaho isicathamiya, u tshina nga magumbudu (gumboot) na amapiano.
Zwiḽiwa zwi ngaho vhuswa (pap), bunny chow, koeksisters, umngqusho na chakalaka.
Mafhungo, thendo (izibongo) na mitambo zwine zwa kovhelwana vhukati ha miṱa.

media.alt: Zwiṱaladzi zwa muzika, ngoma na ndiro ya zwiḽiwa zwi imelaho ifa ḽi tshilaho.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 260 130' role='img'><rect width='260' height='130' fill='#f4efe6'/><ellipse cx='60' cy='70' rx='30' ry='14' fill='#e8a13a'/><path d='M30 70 v26 a30 14 0 0 0 60 0 v-26' fill='#c8871f'/><g fill='#2f5233'><circle cx='140' cy='90' r='8'/><rect x='146' y='52' width='4' height='40'/><circle cx='176' cy='82' r='8'/><rect x='182' y='46' width='4' height='38'/><path d='M148 52 h36 v8 h-36 Z'/></g><circle cx='222' cy='84' r='24' fill='#fff' stroke='#c8b89a' stroke-width='3'/><path d='M210 84 q12 -14 24 0' fill='#8a1f1f'/><circle cx='216' cy='80' r='4' fill='#7a8b5a'/><circle cx='230' cy='86' r='4' fill='#e8a13a'/></svg>

slides.notes: Itani uri sileidi iyi i vhe ine vhagudiswa vha dzhenelela vhukuma. Humbelani vhagudiswa uri vha kovhe luimbo, tshiḽiwa kana mafhungo u bva hayani havho. Ombedzelani uri ifa ḽi tshilaho ndi ḽa muṅwe na muṅwe nahone ḽi dzula ḽi tshi shanduka - amapiano ndi ifa ḽiswa ḽine ḽa khou itwa zwino. Ṱalutshedzani Ḓuvha ḽa Ifa nga u leluwa: ḓuvha ḽa vhurambo ḽa u pembelela mvelele dzashu dzoṱhe roṱhe. Khwaṱhisani ṱhonifho ya phambano.

slides.title: U ṱhogomela ifa ḽashu
slides.lead: Ifa ndi ḽashu roṱhe, nga zwenezwo roṱhe ri fanela u thusa u ḽi tsireledza.

blocks.text: Arali zwifhaṱo zwa kale zwa wa, zwifanyiso zwa matombo zwa ṱaṱiwa, kana mafhungo a sa tsha vhuya a anetshelwa, ifa ḽeneḽo ḽi a xela lini na lini. Ndi ngazwo ri na **miziyamu**, **zwikumbulo** na milayo ine ya tsireledza fhethu ha nṱhani. Fhedzi vhathu vha ḓuvha ḽinwe na ḽinwe na vhone vha a thusa - nga u dalela, u guda na u fhirisela zwine vha zwi ḓivha.

items: Ni songo vhuya na fara kana u tshinyadza vhutsila ha matombo kana zwithu zwa kale.
Dalelani miziyamu na fhethu ha ifa u guda mafhungo ao.
Thetshelesani vhalala ni fhirisele mafhungo avho kha vhaṅwe.

media.alt: Zwanḓa zwivhili zwi tshi fara nga vhulenda tshifhaṱo tshiṱuku na muri, zwi sumbedza u ṱhogomela ifa.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 140' role='img'><rect width='240' height='140' fill='#f4efe6'/><path d='M40 120 q-8 -34 20 -40 l0 20 q30 -6 44 0 l0 -20 q28 6 20 40 Z' fill='#e0b98a'/><rect x='96' y='52' width='34' height='34' fill='#c8b89a'/><path d='M92 52 L113 34 L134 52 Z' fill='#8a1f1f'/><rect x='108' y='66' width='10' height='20' fill='#7a5a3a'/><circle cx='160' cy='58' r='20' fill='#7a8b5a'/><rect x='156' y='58' width='8' height='30' fill='#7a5a3a'/></svg>

slides.notes: Isani ngudo kha 'ndi mini zwino' - ifa ḽi a leluwa u tshinyala nahone ḽi nga xela. Ṱumanyani zwieletshedzo zwiraru na maitele a vhukuma kha lwendo lwa tshikolo. Khwaṱhisani ṱhonifho ya fhethu hukhethwa ha ngaho vhutsila ha matombo ha Vhasann. Ni nga humbela vhagudiswa uri vha bule tshithu tshithihi tshine vha ḓo tshi ita u tsireledza ifa. Hezwi zwi lugisela mbudziso dza u sedzulusa.

slides.eyebrow: Magumo a lwendo - kha ri sedzulule
slides.title: Zwe ra guda kha lwendo
slides.lead: Ro fara lwendo kha mavundu oṱhe a ṱahe ra ṱangana na ifa ḽa mupo, ḽa mvelele na ḽi tshilaho.

blocks.text: U bva kha mabako a **Tshiswiswi tsha Vhathu (Cradle of Humankind)** u swika kha muvhuso wa **Mapungubwe**, dziṱhoho dza **Robben Island** na thavha dzo pendwaho dza **Drakensberg**, ifa ḽa Afrika Tshipembe ḽi anetshela mafhungo a vhathu vhayo vhoṱhe. Ifa ndi ḽa muṅwe na muṅwe, nahone muṅwe na muṅwe a nga thusa u ḽi tsireledza.

blocks.question: Bulani fhethu hararu ho fhambanaho ha ifa ni ambe uri hunwe na hunwe hu kha vundu ḽifhio.
Ṱalutshedzani phambano vhukati ha ifa ḽa mupo, ifa ḽa mvelele na ifa ḽi tshilaho. Ṋeani tsumbo nthihi kha ḽinwe na ḽinwe.
Ndi ngani zwi zwa ndeme u ṱhogomela ifa ḽashu? Ṋeani zwiitisi zwivhili.

slides.notes: Shumisani mbudziso tharu sa mushumo wo ṅwaliwaho kana khaseano ya kḽasi. Mbudziso ya 1 i lingedza u elelwa ha fhethu na mavundu; mbudziso ya 2 i lingedza muhumbulo wa ndeme wa tshaka tharu dza ifa; mbudziso ya 3 i lingedza u pfesesa uri ndi ngani ifa ḽi na ndeme. U kovhelwa ha maakha zwi tevhela sitaela ya CAPS ya Kḽasi ya Vhukati. Phethani nga u humbudza vhagudiswa uri na vhone ndi tshipiḓa tsha ifa ḽi tshilaho ḽa Afrika Tshipembe.
